message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first main.rs cleanup sweep (tick 271)

13-site batch migration of remaining ambient storage calls in main.rs.
Each site routes through the `_with_cx` sibling with call-time cx
resolution via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`.

**Storage reads:**

- L18297 `ft robot search reindex` segment scan:
  `scan_segments_with_cx(&scan_cx, query)`
- L19935/19942/19944 `ft robot workflow` list/status:
  `find_incomplete_workflows_with_cx(&workflows_cx)` +
  `export_workflows_with_cx(&workflows_cx, query)` (shared binding)
- L28827 `ft secret-scan` latest checkpoint:
  `latest_secret_scan_report_with_cx(&scan_report_cx, &scope)`
- L31383 `ft robot events` incomplete workflow lookup:
  `find_incomplete_workflows_with_cx(&incomplete_cx)`

**Storage writes:**

- L18718 `ft robot events annotate` note set:
  `set_event_note_with_cx(&note_cx, event_id, note, by.clone())`
- L25862 `ft events annotate --note` set (same helper, different CLI surface)
- L22773 `ft fts rebuild`: `rebuild_fts_with_cx(&storage_cx, config)` —
  reuses existing tick-246 storage_cx in outer scope
- L26087 `ft events annotate --remove-label`:
  `remove_event_label_with_cx(&rm_label_cx, event_id, label.clone())`
- L27420/27681 `ft plan run` + `ft plan execute` consume prepared plan
  (2 sites via replace_all):
  `consume_prepared_plan_with_cx(&consume_cx, &plan_id, now)`
- L31662 `ft events mute add`:
  `add_event_mute_with_cx(&add_mute_cx, record)`
- L31697 `ft events mute remove`:
  `remove_event_mute_with_cx(&rm_mute_cx, &identity_key)`

**Analytics aggregations (shared `analytics_cx`):**

- L31965 `ft analytics daily`:
  `aggregate_daily_metrics_with_cx(&analytics_cx, since_ts)`
- L31974 `ft analytics by-agent`:
  `aggregate_by_agent_with_cx(&analytics_cx, since_ts)`
- L31984 `ft analytics export` (csv/json):
  `query_usage_metrics_with_cx(&analytics_cx, MetricQuery { ... })`

Total: 13 distinct sites (15 call edits — 2x `consume_prepared_plan`
via replace_all).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 85 (187-271).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 144 sites (131 before + 13).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
